_comment: Single source of truth for TTS (text-to-speech) per-(provider, model) attributes. Pricing is USD per 1M characters. Parallel layout to stt_models.json. Web Speech API (browser) is a free renderer-side option, not listed here — only cloud providers need catalog.

models.label: TTS · standard
models.notes: 低延遲、品質夠用。中文 voice 較平,但通順。

models.label: TTS · HD
models.notes: 音質更乾淨,延遲稍高。長段落較明顯差別。
